name: Pasta Al 'Alfredo
recipeIngredient: salt and freshly ground black pepper to taste
1 lb. pasta, cooked to al dente
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the cream in a saucepan over medium heat until it begins to simmer.
2. Remove from heat and gradually stir in the grated Parmesan and Pecorino cheeses until melted and smooth.
3. Add nutmeg, salt, and black pepper, adjusting to taste.
4. Allow the mixture to thicken slightly, stirring occasionally.
5. Toss the cooked pasta with the sauce, making sure it is well coated.
6. Serve immediately.
